instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with MBSE standards including SysML [17] for system modeling across abstraction levels (requirements, functional, logical, product/technical), ADLs such as ACME [23], AADL [24], MontiArc [25,26], and methodologies like RFLP [18,19], OOSEM [20], SPES [21], SMArDT [22] for architecture description; integration of heterogeneous stakeholders via standardized modeling notations and tools including MathWorks Simulink [28], C++, and Java for behavior simulation and implementation."
]
